LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT MP-DEFT, ARGUED, DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIMS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE IT FOR THE 1ST, 2ND, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SEXUAL BATTERY, THE OFFENSIVE TOUCHING, AS ALLEGED, WAS SUFFICIENTLY RELATED TO THE TREATMENT SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFF TO REQUIRE AN EVIDENTIARY SHOWING UNDER CCP SECTION 425.13 BEFORE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CAN BE SOUGHT.
